attributes.action: Improvement salary for health center staff in Brazilian in Rio de janeiro
attributes.additional_details: I suggest this petition for a salary increase at the Manguariba health center in Paciência, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. The current pay is: R$ 500 and £ 500. This balance represents valuable, special funds received every month. Key points: • it supplements the total pay • it results in a standard, very good income • it is a huge help, as the health center salary is very low Miguel, 12 years old, autistic Parents: Luana and Marcello
